untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern detection requires visual chart pattern recognition (multiple trend line touches, unsymmetrical shape, volume diminishing from left to right within pattern structure). These geometric/structural characteristics cannot be reliably expressed using only price and volume indicators. Entry conditions approximated using uptrend validation and volume/price action, but true pattern identification requires candlestick pattern recognition or proprietary pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions: (1) price above SMA_20 to confirm uptrend context, (2) volume below 20-period historical average to reflect volume diminishment phase, (3) downward price action to trigger breakout. Exit uses reversal above SMA_20. Success rate 69% and average decline 17% noted from source but not encoded as they are backtest performance metrics, not entry logic. hvol_20 used as proxy for 'low volume' in the diminishing volume pattern.
